body.title: CLOSED: Wire Librarian observations into Igor dreaming synthesis
body.result: _read_librarian_observations + _synthesize 3rd section + convergence flag + extra_metadata; 11 dreaming tests pass
body.description:
Dreaming's _synthesize() currently uses 2 inputs: psych log + watch_problems. This ticket adds a third: librarian observations from instance.proposals. Dreaming synthesizes across Igor's internal state AND Librarian behavioral patterns — enabling the convergence signal where both point to the same area.

Add _read_librarian_observations() to dreaming.py (reads kind='librarian_observation' pending proposals, last 10). Modify _synthesize() to accept and include a third prompt section. Add convergence detection: when a synthesized proposal rationale mentions both librarian-domain terms (librarian, research, observation) AND igor-psych terms (igor, valence, arousal, psych), set metadata['convergence']=True via extra_metadata in _add_proposal.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/cognition/dreaming.py
**Design rules:** no new tables; no new memory types; uses existing instance.proposals; psycopg2 only
**Scope boundary:** In scope: _read_librarian_observations + _synthesize() third section + convergence flag + _add_proposal extra_metadata. Out of scope: Librarian-side emission (T-librarian-behavioral-emit).
**Test plan:** _read_librarian_observations() returns kind='librarian_observation' pending proposals. _synthesize() prompt includes librarian section. convergence flag set when rationale references both domains.
